tweets.name: Sameer Khatri

tweets.text:
Debugging curio of the day 🌀

Claude Code seeds its shell with an empty ANTHROPIC_AUTH_TOKEN.
→ Any script there using the official anthropic SDK builds `Authorization: Bearer ` (empty token, trailing space)
→ h11 rejects it — "Illegal header value" — every call dies.

An

④ cheaper way to run AI coding locally or through https://t.co/zMdkq9UO0M
